name: IdsEdwIhmPgmHierDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH main AS (SELECT HIER.IHM_PGM_HIER_SK,HIER.PGM_ID,HIER.SBPRG_ID,HIER.RISK_SVRTY_CD,COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD,HIER.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,HIER.RISK_SVRTY_CD_SK,HIER.IHM_PGM_HIER_NO,HIER.IHM_PGM_HIER_RANK_NO,HIER.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK,HIER.LAST_UPDT_USER_ID,COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS RISK_SVRTY_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.IHM_PGM_HIER HIER LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD1 ON HIER.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD2 ON HIER.RISK_SVRTY_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK),transform AS (SELECT IHM_PGM_HIER_SK,PGM_ID,SBPRG_ID,RISK_SVRTY_CD,CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(SRC_SYS_CD)))=0 THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD,'@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,'@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(RISK_SVRTY_NM)))=0 THEN 'UNK' ELSE RISK_SVRTY_NM END AS RISK_SVRTY_NM,IHM_PGM_HIER_NO,IHM_PGM_HIER_RANK_NO,LAST_UPDT_DT_SK,LAST_UPDT_USER_ID,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,RISK_SVRTY_CD_SK FROM main) SELECT * FROM transform

Annotations:
Job name: IdsEdwhmPgmHierDExtr


Job Extract data from IDS table and apply Fkey and Code denormalization, create a load ready file.
Read data from source table IHM_PGM_HIER
Code SK lookups for Denormalization
Write IHM_PGM_HIER_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Ready Job.
